public_reputation: Union arbiter whose residence and authority are attached to halls of mediation and dispute resolution.
manner: Carries the habits of a arbiter whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Union Spire.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of arbiter in and around Union Spire, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Union Spire workable through the obligations of arbiter while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of arbiter credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Union Spire.

adventure_hooks.summary: Arbiter Demos Vann can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Union Spire.
Arbiter Demos Vann becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a arbiter.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Arbiter Demos Vann is readable as a arbiter tied to Union Spire.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Union Spire: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Arbiter Demos Vann presents as someone shaped by the duties of a arbiter and the daily pressures of Union Spire.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a arbiter, and proof that strangers will not make Union Spire harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Arbiter Demos Vann refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a arbiter too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Arbiter Demos Vann can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Arbiter Demos Vann adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Arbiter Demos Vann always knows more about Union Spire than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to arbiter duties in Union Spire.
